hints.text: Overseas **department of France** (counts as France), Caribbean between Dominica & St Lucia; coverage = only **3 Gen3 trekkers** — memorise them instead of metas

**Habitation Clément** rum-distillery trekker (pinpointable, appears in ACW!): warehouse w/ truck & forklift; outdoor view w/ hills + machinery; red-soil dirt track w/ palms; distillery interior of **H-beam steel**
**Southern coastal trekker**: starts north on a slightly hilly path w/ other people; houses w/ orange roofs; flatter open path w/ ocean glimpses through the trees; ends south at a car park w/ stalls
**Jardin de Balata** trekker: the most tropical/humid feel — dark & damp, buttress-root trees, ferns, bamboo; a man in a black shirt + grey cap sometimes visible
